fresh_facts.claim: IRGC announced on March 31, 2026, threats to target US companies, bases, and hotels in Gulf Cooperation Council countries starting April 1 in retaliation for Isfahan strikes.
IDF conducted over 600 strikes on Iranian ballistic missile sites by March 24, including Esfahan Province production sites, as part of combined US-Israeli efforts.
US conducted over 200 strikes in 24 hours around March 31 using B-2 bombers with GBU-57 bunker busters on Isfahan ammunition depots and missile bases.
Total US strikes exceed 8,000–11,000 targets since the start of the war with Iran.
US military forces are using Apache helicopters, A-10s, and targeting Iranian boats in the Persian Gulf, dominating the skies with Iranian attacks down 90%.
IRGC claimed intact command structure despite bombings and demonstrated precision strikes including damaging a US AWACS in Saudi Arabia.
Iran warned on April 1, 2026, of no extension on strategic deadline and readiness to continue war with potential US ground invasion if demands unmet.
Mojtaba Khamenei was designated supreme leader on March 8, 2026, following the death of Ayatollah Khamenei.
Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr replaced killed official Ali Larijani on March 17, 2026, signaling IRGC hardliner dominance in the regime.
Ali Larijani announced an Interim Leadership Council on March 1, 2026, accusing the US and Israel of attempting regime dismantling efforts.
President Pezeshkian's budget boosted security spending 150% amid ongoing inflation that outpaces wages and persistent currency collapse.
Intense uprising reported in Narmak with protesters demanding total regime overthrow, defying security force actions.
Iranian security force crackdowns killed approximately 30,000 protesters in the first 48 hours according to reports from January 8.
Protest chants targeted both reformers and hardliners within the Iranian regime.
Iran's Foreign Ministry denied claims of negotiations, stating via Geo News that no talks occurred under any pretext and emphasized exchange of messages only through official channels.
fresh_facts.source: Geo News video uploaded approximately 6 hours before April 1, 2026

fresh_facts.claim: Iran rejected a US 15-point peace plan and made conditional ceasefire demands involving Lebanon and Hezbollah.
Trump postponed strikes on Iranian power plants while claiming negotiations that Iran denied occurring.
US Central Command's March 8 X post urged Iranian civilians to stay home amid regime use of populated areas for military operations.
Trump relayed large leadership losses to NBC regarding Iranian regime casualties.
Saudi Crown Prince vowed force against Iranian incursions into Saudi territory.
The war between the US-Israeli coalition and Iran began on February 28, 2026, involving Operation Epic Fury with thousands of strikes.
Iran conducted Operation True Promise IV as a response to US-Israeli strikes.
The war entered its fourth week by March 21, 2026, with potential US wind-down signals emerging.
IRGC shifted to high-impact missiles on March 10, 2026.
Discussions between leaders on Iranian attacks' impact on regional and naval security were noted in a Geo News report from April 1, 2026.

regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli coalition has executed 13,000+ strikes including 600+ IDF strikes on missile sites and 200+ B-2 strikes on Isfahan targets, while Iran retaliates with threats against GCC targets and demonstrates operational resilience through intact IRGC command structure and precision strikes; regime faces succession consolidation under Mojtaba Khamenei, IRGC hardliner dominance, economic strain with 150% security spending increase, and escalating domestic protests amid diplomatic deadlock.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran issued April 1, 2026 warning of no extension on strategic deadline and readiness to continue war with potential ground invasion response, while IRGC threatened targeting US companies and bases across GCC countries starting April 1 in retaliation for Isfahan strikes.
